x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Topology maps provide infrastructure relationship context Now Assist uses for AI-driven impact traversal.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("sa_pattern");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();return{status:n>=50?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" active service mapping patterns",finding:n<50?"Only "+n+" active mapping patterns. Now Assist TSOM topology-based impact analysis requires comprehensive pattern coverage.":n+" active patterns -- Now Assist TSOM has topology foundation for AI impact traversal."};})()
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure topology maps for key infrastructure layers. Now Assist TSOM uses topology for AI impact scope assessment.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_0bf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cc8
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Topology maps provide infrastructure relationship context Now Assist uses for AI-driven impact traversal.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Topology Map Configuration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("sa_pattern");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();return{status:n>=50?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" active service mapping patterns",finding:n<50?"Only "+n+" active mapping patterns. Now Assist TSOM topology-based impact analysis requires comprehensive pattern coverage.":n+" active patterns -- Now Assist TSOM has topology foundation for AI impact traversal."};})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>AIOPS</module><number>CHK0000449</number><order>70</order><remediation_guidance>Configure topology maps for key infrastructure layers. Now Assist TSOM uses topology for AI impact scope assessment.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>0bf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cc8</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Topology Map Configuration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_0bf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cc8</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
